case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. ANGELICA MORGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, ANGELICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE #275 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94110, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74798636)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ANGELICA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ANGELICA DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 74798636) AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ANGELICA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ANGELICA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ANGELICA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74798636), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC SERVED SEP-27-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, ANGELICA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74798636), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC SERVED SEP-27-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE SEP-28-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74798636) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $6.16/DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 74798636) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
